properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This Little Light Of mine I'm gonna let it shine. x3 Let it shine! Let it shine! Let it shine!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hiding on my bushel No! I'm gonna let it shine x3 Let it shine! Let it shine! Let it shine!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus is the light, I'm gonna let it shine, x3 Let it shine! Let it shine! Let it shine!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Don't let Satan blow it out! I'm gonna let it shine x3 Let it shine! Let it shine! Let it shine!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let it shine through Jesus Comes, I'm gonna let it shine x3 Let it shine! Let it shine! Let it shine!
